## Problem

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation you are experiencing. E.g. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen or the feature you'd like to see implemented.

## Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.
